name: agent-skills
description: Cross-platform agent skills for browser automation and image generation and manipulation. By Posthuman Resources LLC.

plugins.name: browser-buddy
plugins.description: Browser automation skill wrapping Vercel's agent-browser CLI with additional patterns for scraping, testing, form-filling, and visual diffing. Use when the user needs to interact with websites, fill forms, take screenshots, scrape data, or automate browser tasks.

plugins.name: artistic-vision
plugins.description: Gemini-powered image intelligence (describe, generate, edit, ocr, detect, extract, diff, compare, analyze, batch) plus Sharp-powered local manipulation (info, resize, upscale, crop, palette, optimize, convert, sprite sheets). Use when the user needs to understand, create, edit, or process images.

plugins.name: onepassword
plugins.description: Reliable secret retrieval from 1Password via the op CLI. Resolves native op or the Windows op.exe under WSL, reveals concealed fields, and strips the carriage returns and wrapping quotes that corrupt SSH keys and tokens. Use when the user wants to read a secret, API key, or SSH key from 1Password, or inject secrets into a command or env file.

plugins.name: render
plugins.description: Work with Render.com: author and manage render.yaml blueprints, SSH into running services with the host-key flags Render requires, understand the hosting model (services, regions, internal networking, on-box paths), and call the REST API. Use when the user wants to deploy or configure a Render service, ssh into a Render host, run a migration, or query the Render API.

plugins.name: primer
plugins.description: Turn a vague product idea into a primer build-brief, decompose it into idempotent dependency-ordered task files, and run the build with a dynamic Workflow (parallel where safe) or the vendored primer-exec runner. Use when the user has a fuzzy concept and wants it turned into a buildable plan, says 'make a primer', 'bootstrap a project from this idea', or 'run the build'.
